steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that Rivera performed songs “much more slowly than other ranchera singers did.” This is the specific way she differed from other singers.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D — She altered classic songs by slowing them down. captures exactly what the passage states: she altered classic songs by slowing them down. The other three contradict details in the passage or introduce unsupported claims. That matches Choice D — She altered classic songs by slowing them down..
